name: Chili Cheese Cornsticks
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat the egg, milk, and 2 tablespoons vegetable oil together in a bowl until combined.
2. Gradually add the dry ingredients (flour, sugar, baking powder) to the wet mixture, stirring only until mixed.
3. Stir in the shredded cheddar cheese and chopped green chilies.
4. Grease a pan with cooking spray or oil.
5. Pour the batter into the greased pan, spreading it evenly.
6. Bake at 425°F (220°C) for 15 minutes, or until golden brown.
